_comment: Complete branding configuration sample for the 'tensor' product.
_description: This is the exact shape returned by GET /api/v1/products/:productId. The widget's BrandingStore reads the ui_theme_config field and applies it dynamically. All fields match the BrandingConfig interface in packages/chatbot-ui/src/branding/branding-types.ts.
name: Tensor Assistant

colors._comment: All color values must be valid hex (#rrggbb or #rgb) or rgb()/rgba() strings. Invalid values fall back to the default theme.

typography._comment: Font family is applied inside the Shadow DOM and does not affect the host page.
typography.fontFamily: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

layout._comment: chatWidth and chatHeight control the size of the expanded chat window.

assets._comment: Asset URLs must be absolute (https://) or root-relative (/path). Empty string disables the asset.

content._comment: All text content displayed inside the widget. Customize per product.
content.welcomeMessage: Ask Tensor Assistant about analytics, models, and reports.
content.offlineMessage: Tensor Assistant is currently offline. Please check back later.
content.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try sending your message again.
content.subtitle: Online

featureFlags._comment: Boolean flags that enable or disable widget features at runtime.
